summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Voice Orchestrator conversational agent app. All 15 required features tested successfully including conversation management, agent swarm, skills marketplace, call handling placeholders, and settings configuration.
passed_tests: Backend API /api/ endpoint returns correct response
Backend API /api/stats returns stats data
Main conversation page loads with voice orb
Create new conversation session via + button
Send text message via chat input and receive AI response
Navigate to Agent Swarm page via sidebar
Create new agent with name, description, model selection
Toggle agent active/inactive status
Navigate to Skills page via sidebar
Install preset skill from marketplace
Toggle skill enabled/disabled
Navigate to Dialer page via sidebar - verify placeholder displays
Navigate to Settings page via sidebar
Test TTS voice button in settings
Test API connectivity button in settings
Complete conversation flow (sessions, messages, chat)
Agent swarm management (CRUD operations)
Skills system (create, toggle, delete)
Call handling placeholders
Settings management and persistence
TTS functionality with base64 audio generation
All navigation between pages working correctly
